entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum, the crop studied for ergot infection

entities.name: CLAVICEPS FUSIFORMIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen causing ergot infection in pearl millet

entities.name: ERGOT INFECTION
entities.description: The disease caused by Claviceps fusiformis in pearl millet

entities.name: PROTOGYNY PERIOD
entities.description: The length of time between the receptivity of the stigma and the shedding of pollen

entities.name: FP-AI PERIOD
entities.description: The time interval between full protogyny and anthesis initiation

entities.name: FLOWERING EVENT FACTORS
entities.description: Factors related to the timing of flowering, including protogyny and FP-AI period

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where pollen is non-functional due to cytoplasmic factors

entities.name: CMS LINES
entities.description: A lines characterized by cytoplasmic male sterility

entities.name: MAINTAINER LINES
entities.description: B lines used to maintain the CMS lines

entities.name: POLLINATOR LINES
entities.description: R lines used to pollinate CMS lines to produce hybrids

entities.name: F1 HYBRIDS
entities.description: First generation hybrids produced from A x R and B x R crosses

entities.name: ERGOT SEVERITY
entities.description: The degree or intensity of ergot infection in the plant

entities.name: SUSCEPTIBILITY
entities.description: The vulnerability of a line or hybrid to ergot infection

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a line or hybrid to resist ergot infection

entities.name: SEED SET
entities.description: The successful production of seeds following pollination

entities.name: RESTORATION ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of pollinator lines to restore fertility in CMS hybrids

entities.name: STIGMA LENGTH
entities.description: The physical length of the stigmas in the flower

relationships.description: Influence the likelihood and severity of infection
